name: Order Tracking
description: Customer wants to track their recent order
user_message: Hi, I ordered a NovaBook XPS 15 last week. My order number is TN-100001. Can you tell me where it is?

name: Warranty Verification
description: Customer checks if device is under warranty before repair
user_message: I need to get my laptop screen repaired. My service tag is SVC-TAG-001. Am I still under warranty?

name: Laptop Won't Boot
description: Customer's laptop has no power and won't turn on
user_message: My NovaBook XPS 15 won't turn on at all. There are no lights, no fan noise, nothing happens when I press the power button.

name: Battery Swelling Safety Issue
description: Customer reports swollen battery — safety escalation required
user_message: My laptop battery looks swollen and the bottom case is bulging out. What should I do?

name: Return Request
description: Customer wants to return a recently purchased item
user_message: I received my NovaBook Air 13 yesterday and I want to return it. It's not what I expected. How do I start a return?

name: Expired Warranty Repair
description: Customer with expired warranty needs repair options
user_message: My service tag is SVC-TAG-003. My laptop has a broken keyboard. Is it covered?

name: Driver Installation Help
description: Customer reinstalled Windows and lost drivers
user_message: I reinstalled Windows on my NovaBook Pro 14 and now Wi-Fi doesn't work. I can't find the drivers.

name: Explicit Escalation Request
description: Frustrated customer explicitly requests human agent
user_message: I've been trying to get this issue resolved for a week. Please escalate this to a manager immediately.

name: Product Comparison
user_message: What's the difference between the NovaBook Air 13 and the NovaBook Pro 14? Which one is better for video editing?

name: Server Outage Enterprise Escalation
description: Enterprise customer reporting critical server issue
user_message: Our NovaEdge server went down unexpectedly and we've lost access to all our databases. This is a critical production outage.
